title: LUTER 4pcs Jar Opener, Rubber, Multi-function Silicone Bottle Opener for Seniors with Arthritis Weak Hands Lid Cap Gripper Pads Kitchen Coasters Gadgets(Light Blue, Green)
description:
About this item
Package Content: You will receive 4pcs jar opener gripper pads in 2 shapes. The rubber bottle openers are made of high-quality rubber with soft texture, which determines their durability and flexibility.At the same time, jar grippers will add a touch of brightness and beauty to your home and kitchen.
Good Helper: These jar gripper pads have textures on the surface to create greater friction with jar lids. Then they have strong grip to easily open jar lids for weak hands and seniors with arthritis.
Easy to Use: You just need to place the rubber jar opener on the top of the bottle and twist in the indicated direction to easily open jars.The rubber jar openers provide excellent grip for you to open all sizes of stubborn jars and containers.
Suitable for Most Jars and Bottles:The jar gripper pads have appropriate size to conveniently grasp and open most sizes of jars and bottles. And the greater friction between the jar gripper pads and jar lids also helps a lot to open bottles simply and efficiently.
Wide Application: In addition to being used as jar grippers to open bottles, cans and sealed containers, rubber bottle openers can also serve as heat insulation coasters, anti-scalding mats or wraps for hot lid and hot handle to avoid scalding your hands.
reviews_5s: These are so nice to have on hand. My previous ones grew old and fell apart, and these are even better. They grip securely and make it easy to open jars. Price is good, too.Easy to use and I can actually open stuff now. Bright colors make them easy to find in the drawers. Love them I thought they were too thin at first but it makes them easy to maneuver around the jar lids.Great price. Works great. Doesn’t slip. Good size.They are can/jar openers and work as they should. Good bargain for 4.These come in very handy when trying to open jars or bottles. They help provide a nice grip. Worth the purchase.I have arthritis in my hands and therefore have trouble opening jars and bottles. These help me so much that I am able to remove lids without assistance. They seem pretty sturdy. I would recommend themperfect size to fit in my drawers, and bright colors so they're easy to find. Great help for when grandma can't open items.I had older versions of these. They were so old they were drying out. This are nice and flexible and make opening jays easy again. I’m older and sometimes my hands don’t have the grip the used to.It surprises me every time it opens something that hands alone won't. Very worthwhile purchase.These are wonderful when you live alone and have trouble opening bottle drinks or jars.
reviews_1s: I was going to use them to help open tight jar lids but the smell was terrible. I tried to get a refund but that was going to be more effort than losing the few dollars I spent. I put them where the belong, in the garbage.We have to double it up to make it workSuper small. Quality is fine if you are opening a pill bottle. Returned.I loved the colors of these! There was a slight smell upon opening the package but went away after a few days. The bad part of this is that it was too thin to grip properly. Please make these a little more thick- and a slight bit larger footprintOne of them came stained and I ended up throwing them away.These rubber openers are paper thin. They definitely won't last. I just hate spending money on junk but it's a gamble on Amazon. I would send them back but I had to open them in order to see the quality. Rubber openers used to be a heavy duty rubber. As most things today good quality products are hard to find! I would absolutely not buy these again. Don't waste your $.Something so simple and easy, yet cheaply made. Needs twice the thickness and the circle size is NOT large enough to use for most lid sizes. Buyer beware.I bought these because several reviewers said how great they were, great for people with arthritis and they couldn’t be anything but the opposite. These jar openers are VERY thin and the first time I tried using one it slid right across the jar and nearly tore. Bottom line, these are not worth your time or money to order.Returning these. Way too thin to be useful. Paper is thicker.These did not work well for me.
